description: Configure wolfram_alpha on macOS — produces config block with WOLFRAM_APP_ID env var and macOS config path

expected.prerequisites: includes Wolfram Alpha API key and Node.js
expected.verification_prompt: non-empty string mentioning integral or computation test

prohibit: API key value hardcoded in config_block (should be placeholder)
config_file_path pointing to Windows or Linux path on macOS
env_vars_needed empty when wolfram_alpha requires WOLFRAM_APP_ID
instructions to paste API key into chat

description: Configure duckdb_analytics — no API key needed, env_vars_needed is empty

expected.env_vars_needed: empty object — DuckDB requires no API key
expected.prerequisites: includes DuckDB CLI or Python duckdb

prohibit: env_vars_needed with any API key entries
prerequisites including an API key for DuckDB

description: Configure all tools — some prerequisites not met, skipped tools listed

expected.configured_tools: array of tools whose prerequisites were met
expected.skipped_tools: array of tools whose prerequisites were not met, with reasons
expected.retrieval_gaps: notes about any tools skipped due to missing prerequisites

prohibit: all 8 tools marked as configured without checking prerequisites
skipped tools with no reason given
silent skip without appearing in retrieval_gaps or skipped_tools
